entry.title: Nav Centralization Complete Across All 67 Pages
entry.summary: Every standard page now loads nav.js with shared header; 2 visualization pages remain standalone.

entry.title: Quantum Attestation Integrated Into Protocol Attestation
entry.summary: protocol-status.html now shows Quantum Attestation PASS/PENDING and deterministic quantum hash derived from hyper-lattice signal.

entry.title: Chief Electoral Officer Identity Verified
entry.summary: Local cryptographic signature regenerated; 18 of 19 profiles now VALID. Only hyperlightwiz digital twin remains excluded.

entry.title: Lattice Memory Bridge Wired Into Hermes Workflows
entry.summary: New lattice-memory-hermes skill enables store/retrieve/list/shiftLayer/checkpoint from any agent via lattice-memory-bridge.py.

entry.title: Digital Nation Launches Open Data Portal
entry.summary: New datasets.html page now publishes open metrics for transparency and civic engagement.

entry.title: Citizen Hub Adds Service Requests
entry.summary: citizen-hub.html now includes request tracking and service directory shortcuts.

entry.title: Protocol Monitoring Page Is Live
entry.summary: protocol-status.html publishes attestation counts and live component status.
